name: global-government-contracts-aggregator
title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper
description: Find public tender and contract opportunities from official UK Contracts Finder, EU TED, and optional SAM.gov sources. Use for procurement search, tender digests, and AI bid/no-bid workflows; returns buyer, title, status, dates, value, codes, official URL, match reason, matched fields, and stable record keys.

contract-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean public government contract or tender record saved to the dataset.
